option.name: value
option.value: Captain America is a superhero created by Joe Simon.

option.name: bodyString
rawBodyString
value
option.value: Captain America is a superhero created by Joe Simon.

option.name: value
option.value: Captain America is a superhero created by Joe Simon and Jack Kirby who appears in American comic books published by Marvel Comics. The character first appeared in Captain America Comics #1, published on December 20, 1940, by Timely Publications, a corporate predecessor to Marvel.

option.name: bodyString
option.value: { "message": "Profile updated successfully", "editedUser": { "_id": "69dfc7828a7f2850ef4d474c", "firstName": "captain", "lastName": "america", "email": "captain@gmail.com", "photoUrl": "https://res.cloudinary.com/dcofqcyq8/image/upload/v1776292856/loheonlcmg57kpcia9mv.webp", "skills": [ "cricket,fly,war,super-hero" ], "createdAt": "2026-04-15T17:14:42.324Z", "updatedAt": "2026-04-15T22:40:57.295Z", "__v": 0, "about": "Captain America is a superhero created by Joe Simon and Jack Kirby who appears in American comic books published by Marvel Comics. The character first appeared in Captain America Comics #1, published on December 20, 1940, by Timely Publications, a corporate predecessor to Marvel.", "age": 29, "gender": "male" } }

option.value: Captain America is a superhero created by Joe Simon and Jack Kirby who appears in American comic books published by Marvel Comics. The character first appeared in Captain America Comics #1, published on December 20, 1940, by Timely Publications, a corporate predecessor to Marvel.
